title: Déclaration du gouvernement britannique incluant Chypre dans la convention
text_preview: G.R. • In accordance with paragraph (a) of Article XXI of the Convention for the Establishment of the European Plant Protection Organisation I, John Hensley, Assistant Secretary In the Ministry of Agriculture and Fisheries, on behalf of the Government of the United Ringdom, declare that the participation of the Government of the United Kingdom in the Convention Includes Cyprus, which 1s a territory for whose interna…

pages.text:
G.R. •

In accordance with paragraph (a) of Article XXI of the Convention for the Establishment of the European

Plant Protection Organisation I, John Hensley, Assistant

Secretary In the Ministry of Agriculture and Fisheries, on behalf of the Government of the United Ringdom, declare that the participation of the Government of the

United Kingdom in the Convention Includes Cyprus, which 1s a territory for whose international relations it 1s responsible.

fra Heusle

Dated this Thirtieth day of January, 195%

nue 5/2/52

No. 108

CD.1285/5

Her Britannic Majesty's Embassy presents its compliments to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and the honour to confirm that on the 18th of April,

His Majesty's Government declared son or le Suppen Plant Protocion ore at a 00 that the participation in the Convention of His

Majesty's Government Includes the islands of Jersey and Guernsey.

British Embassy,

Paris.

1 February 1966
